## ResolverSourcesForForm type

Derives the resolver source-key union for a FormSpec element array.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ResolverSourcesForForm<E extends readonly FormElement[]> = ExtractDynamicSourcesFromArray<E> & string;
```
